german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PM Roles Dominate, Creating Significant Imbalance
pm_type.subtitle: A substantial gap exists between Core PM and Customer-facing PM roles, highlighting a concentration in product management.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: Over half of the workforce is in senior positions, indicating a strong emphasis on experienced talent.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of the workforce prefers on-site arrangements over hybrid and remote work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: 36% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 34% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Strong Balance and Diversity
industry.subtitle: All roles are equally represented, but unclassified positions raise concerns about accessibility.
